attributes.action: make teaching of oversexualisation women part of curriculum in secondary school
attributes.additional_details: I feel its very important that all young people are educated on this issue and by going to our government we feel is the only way to make the bets impact in classrooms all over the country.
attributes.background: making teaching oversexualisation part of the pd lessons in uk secondary schools for year 9(intro),10,11 (in more detail)

rejection.details:
